debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
d : ℕ
h𝓒 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓒
⊢ IsNIPWith d ↑(@SetFamily.restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent α 𝓒)

failed_attempts:
by
    classical
    simpa [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent] using h𝓒.image fun A ↦
      (_ ↓∩ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)
h𝓒.image _

by
    classical
    simpa [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent] using h𝓒.image

by
    classical
    simpa [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent] using h𝓒.image fun A ↦ _ ↓∩ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B

by
    classical
    -- `restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent` is the image of `𝓒` under the map
    -- `A ↦ _ ↓∩ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B`; NIP is preserved under images.
    simpa [SetFamily.restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, Finset.coe_image, Set.image_image,
      Function.comp] using h𝓒.image (fun A : Set α ↦ _ ↓∩ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)
h𝓒.image _
h𝓒.image _

by

by
    classical
    simpa [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, Set.image_image] using
      h𝓒.image (fun A : Set α ↦ (_ : Set ↑((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A)) ↓∩ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)

classical

h𝓒.image _
h𝓒.image _

h𝓒.image (fun A ↦ (· ↓∩ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B))
